headline: Block Resets Cost Base With AI Agent Goose And Productivity Targets
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) has carried out a workforce reduction of over 40% as part of a two year transformation of its operations. The company is rolling out an internal AI agent called "Goose" aimed at reshaping how employees work and how core processes run. Management highlights changes to gross profit per employee and developer efficiency as key measures of this new operating model. Block, the parent of Cash App and Square, operates at the intersection of digital payments and software tools for...

headline: Uber CEO says other execs are lying about AI: 'They say it'll be fine' but privately admit millions of jobs are gone
summary: Dara Khosrowshahi says AI will be able to replace 70-80% of the work humans can do.
